YOUR ENCODER EXPERTS
ENGINEERING WITHOUT ADDITIONAL COSTS
We offer to adapt the encoder to your needs on a mechanical, electronic and optical level. Hohner has a section of product adaptation in order to offer you quick solutions. Also available in small quantities.
PERSONALIZATION
One of the strong points of our company is customer service, and one of the tools that make us flexible is professional consulting.

PRODUCTS
PRODUCTS
Hohner Automation has a wide range of incremental and absolute encoders, different lineal measuring systems and all the accessories that you may need for the correct assembly of our sensors. In the other sensors section, you will find potentiometers, inclinometers and counters.
